title: anagallis arvensis f. decipiens
intro: Anagallis arvensis f. decipiens, also known as the false forget-me-not, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anagallis arvensis f. decipiens include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
